/usr/bin/ar qc libathena_lib.a CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/attacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/castle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/chess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/movegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/movepick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/offset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/perft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/piece.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/piececlass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/square.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/uci.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/athena_lib.dir/src/zobrist.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libathena_lib.a
